name: Background Dragon
name_jp: バックグランド・ドラゴン
desc: If this card is in the GY and you control no cards: You can Special Summon both this card, and 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand, in Defense Position, but banish this card when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Background Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in the GY and you control no cards: You can Special Summon both this card, and 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand, in Defense Position, but banish this card when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Background Dragon" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in the GY and you control no cards: You can Special Summon both this card, and 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand, in Defense Position, but banish this card when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Background Dragon" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
